Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Addon Panel

Collapsible bottom panel with tab bar. Houses Controls, Actions, Source, and Accessibility addons below the canvas.

Full Addon Panel

  • click{ target: 'button.primary', x: 240, y: 118 }
  • focusbutton[type='submit']
  • keydown{ key: 'Enter', shiftKey: false }
<button
  class="btn btn-primary"
  type="button"
>
  Click me
</button>
0 violations — all checks passed
Color contrast
Pass
Keyboard focus
Pass
ARIA labels
Pass 
<section class="cf-addon-panel">
  <div class="cf-tabbar" role="tablist" aria-label="Addon panels">
    <button class="cf-addon-tab is-active" type="button" data-cf-tab="controls">Controls</button>
    <button class="cf-addon-tab" type="button" data-cf-tab="actions">Actions</button>
    <button class="cf-addon-tab" type="button" data-cf-tab="source">Source</button>
    <button class="cf-addon-tab" type="button" data-cf-tab="a11y">Accessibility</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cf-addon-content">
    <div class="cf-panel-pane is-active" data-cf-pane="controls">…</div>
    <div class="cf-panel-pane" data-cf-pane="actions">…</div>
    <div class="cf-panel-pane" data-cf-pane="source">…</div>
    <div class="cf-panel-pane" data-cf-pane="a11y">…</div>
  </div>
</section>

Collapsed State

Add .is-collapsed to hide the panel. components.js toggles this via [data-cf-toggle-addons] in the toolbar.

<!-- In the toolbar -->
<button class="cf-tool" type="button"
        data-cf-toggle-addons aria-pressed="true">
  <i class="bi bi-sliders"></i>Controls
</button>

<!-- The panel -->
<section class="cf-addon-panel is-collapsed">…</section>

Tab Switching

components.js wires tab switching automatically: clicking a [data-cf-tab] button activates the matching [data-cf-pane] div within the same .cf-addon-panel.

// Already handled by components.js — no extra code needed.
// The data-cf-tab / data-cf-pane pairing drives tab behavior.

// Tab button
// data-cf-tab="controls"  → activates pane: data-cf-pane="controls"

// To switch programmatically:
document.querySelector('[data-cf-tab="source"]').click();

Action Log

Use .cf-action-log inside the "Actions" pane. Each .cf-action-log-item gets a left accent stripe in the accent color.

  • clickbutton.btn-primary
  • changeinput[name="email"] → "user@example.com"
  • submitform#login
<ul class="cf-action-log">
  <li class="cf-action-log-item">
    <span><strong>click</strong></span>
    <span>button.btn-primary</span>
  </li>
  <li class="cf-action-log-item">
    <span><strong>change</strong></span>
    <span>input[name="email"] → "user@example.com"</span>
  </li>
</ul>

Classes

ClassDescription
.cf-addon-panelBottom panel with surface background. Add .is-collapsed to hide.
.cf-tabbarHorizontal row of tab buttons with bottom-border underline style.
.cf-addon-tabTab button. Add .is-active for selected tab (primary underline).
.cf-addon-contentContent area with padding. Contains panel panes.
.cf-panel-paneHidden by default. Add .is-active to show. Matched via data-cf-pane.
.cf-action-logUnstyled list for action events.
.cf-action-log-itemSingle event row with monospace font and left accent stripe.
.cf-a11y-scoreInline success indicator in success color with check icon.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
